ArtifactMetadata: {"ArtifactType":"other","Summary":"Script to write specific dining.html log steps to files."}
CodeContent:
"import json

path = "/Users/pravinsam/.gemini/antigravity-ide/brain/353b6a43-7fa1-4a16-b18d-9ef0cd6ad7d2/.system_generated/logs/transcript.jsonl"
with open(path, "r") as f:
    for line in f:
        data = json.loads(line)
        step_index = data.get("step_index")
        if step_index in (125, 126, 162, 163):
            print(f"Step {step_index}: source={data.get('source')}, type={data.get('type')}")
            with open(f"step_{step_index}.json", "w") as out_f:
                json.dump(data, out_f, indent=2)
"
Description: "Dump step JSONs to find original dining.html content"
